HomePage.title: Build Your Career with Shramik Seva
HomePage.description: Connect skilled workers with meaningful employment opportunities.
HomePage.heroDescription: A modern marketplace connecting skilled workers with meaningful employment opportunities. Build your career or find the perfect talent today.

features.title: Why Choose Shramik Seva?
features.subtitle: Everything you need for seamless job matching and employment

quickHiring.title: Quick Hiring
quickHiring.description: Find and hire talent in minutes with our streamlined application process

verifiedProfessionals.title: Verified Professionals
verifiedProfessionals.description: Work with skilled, verified professionals with ratings and reviews

flexibleWork.title: Flexible Work
flexibleWork.description: Choose from temporary and permanent opportunities that fit your lifestyle

cta.title: Ready to Take the Next Step?
cta.description: Join thousands of workers and employers building meaningful connections today. Your next opportunity is just a click away.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Get started in three simple steps

step1.title: Create Your Profile
step1.description: Register as a worker or employer and set up your profile in minutes.

step2.title: Post or Find Jobs
step2.description: Employers post jobs; workers apply for opportunities that match their skills.

step3.title: Work & Get Paid
step3.description: Collaborate securely, complete the work, and manage everything through our platform.

testimonials.title: What Our Users Say
testimonials.subtitle: Join thousands of satisfied workers and employers who trust Shramik Seva

test1.quote: Shramik Seva helped me find a steady plumbing job within a week. The process was so simple!
test1.author: Rajesh Kumar

test2.quote: Finding reliable electricians was always a headache until I started using this platform.
test2.author: Amit Sharma

test3.quote: The OTP verification gives me peace of mind that the work is tracked correctly.
test3.author: Sandeep Singh
